_publications._publicationTitle: TGFβ Signaling Increases Net Acid Extrusion, Proliferation and Invasion in Panc-1 Pancreatic Cancer Cells: SMAD4 Dependence and Link to Merlin/NF2 Signaling.

_contextSnippet: MIAPaCa-2 cells predominantly showed upregulation of NBCn1 and NBCe2
details: Showed elevated expression of NBCn1 and NBCe2 transporters compared to HPDE cells
